nodes.name: style
nodes.summary: CSS entry point that imports all four CSS partials (tokens, base, layout, components) in order; no direct style rules

nodes.name: tokens
nodes.summary: Design token definitions: dark-first CSS custom properties for surfaces, borders, text, accent colors, semantic colors, nav, typography, spacing, shadows, and transitions; includes light theme override

nodes.name: base
nodes.summary: CSS reset, body/typography defaults, Inter font import, heading scale, link styles, and common utility classes

nodes.name: layout
nodes.summary: Structural layout styles for sticky site header, brand/logo, theme toggle button, sticky navigation with hamburger mobile menu, main container max-width, and footer with responsive breakpoints

nodes.name: components
nodes.summary: Comprehensive component-level styles covering cards, stat cards, rank badges, conference badges, tables, buttons, prediction cards, simulator controls, team page elements, matchup UI, and admin dashboard widgets
